headline: Monday's session: top gainers and losers in the S&P500 index
summary: Join us in exploring the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Monday as we examine the latest happenings in today's session.

headline: Here is why Corning Incorporated (GLW) is among the Most Overvalued Quantum Computing Stocks According to Short Sellers
summary: With a forward P/E of 46.52, Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) is among the 10 Most Overvalued Quantum Computing Stocks According to Short Sellers. On June 5, UBS analyst Joshua Spector raised the firm’s price target on Corning (GLW) to $228 from $223 and maintained a Buy rating. The analyst noted that, following updates to the firm’s financial model, […]

headline: MACOM Technology And Corning On CNBC’s ‘Final Trades’
summary: Joseph M. Terranova recommends Corning Inc. (GLW) as final trade on CNBC's Halftime Report. Amazon signs multiyear deal with Corning for fiber optics.
